name: Warmwater Circulation Controller
description: Interval-based control for domestic hot water circulation pumps with special release and time-window scheduling

defaultActive.label: Default active
defaultActive.description: Whether the controller is active by default

reactivateEnabled.label: Re-enable
reactivateEnabled.description: Enables automatic reactivation after manual control

defaultOnTime.label: Default on-time
defaultOnTime.description: Pump run time outside of configured time windows

defaultOffTime.label: Default off-time
defaultOffTime.description: Pump pause time outside of configured time windows

specialReleaseOffDelay.label: Special release off-delay
specialReleaseOffDelay.description: Time the pump keeps running after a special release ends

from.label: From
from.description: Start time of the time window (HH:MM)

to.label: To
to.description: End time of the time window (HH:MM)

onTime.label: On-time
onTime.description: Pump run time within this time window

offTime.label: Off-time
offTime.description: Pump pause time within this time window

activeCondition.name: Active condition
activeCondition.description: Determines whether the controller is active

heatingAvailable.name: Heating available
heatingAvailable.description: Whether the heating system is running (e.g. heat pump in heat_pump mode)

runCondition.name: Run condition
runCondition.description: All conditions must be true for the interval loop to start (e.g. presence)

specialRelease.name: Special release
specialRelease.description: Forces the pump on regardless of the interval (e.g. PV surplus, high tank temperature)

pump.name: Pump
pump.description: Circulation pump switch state (true = on, false = off)
